---
title: "NCBI data and metadata"
format: html
---

# NCBI SRA data accession and metadata extraction

## Load packages

```{r}
#| label: packages
library(rentrez)
library(xml2)
library(tidyverse)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(dplyr)
library(here)
```

## Query NCBI

```{r}
#| label: search for the BioProject
search_result <- entrez_search(db = "bioproject", term = "PRJNA1458311[PRJA]")

```

```{r}
#| label: fetch the full record in XML
xml_data <- entrez_fetch(db = "bioproject", id = search_result$ids, rettype = "xml")

# parse XML string into an R object
parsed_xml <- read_xml(xml_data)

#check output
print(parsed_xml)

#view output
cat(substr(as.character(parsed_xml), 1, 2000))

```

```{r}
#| label: fetch and parse sample-level metadata

# find the associated BioSample IDs
links <- entrez_link(dbfrom = "bioproject", id = search_result$ids, db = "biosample")
biosample_ids <- links$links$bioproject_biosample

# fetch the raw XML for these sample IDs
samples_xml_raw <- entrez_fetch(db = "biosample", id = biosample_ids, rettype = "xml")
samples_xml <- read_xml(samples_xml_raw)

# find individual sample nodes
sample_nodes <- xml_find_all(samples_xml, ".//BioSample")

# build the data frame
sample_df <- data.frame(
  BioSample = xml_attr(sample_nodes, "accession"),
  Site_Name = xml_text(xml_find_first(sample_nodes, ".//Title")),
  
  # use harmonized names for reliability
  Date      = xml_text(xml_find_first(sample_nodes, ".//Attribute[@harmonized_name='collection_date']")),
  Lat_Lon   = xml_text(xml_find_first(sample_nodes, ".//Attribute[@harmonized_name='lat_lon']")),
  
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# preview sample-level spreadsheet
print(sample_df)

```

```{r}
#| label: make dataframe DwC compliant

# input EML derived dataframe
dwc_df <- sample_df %>%
  mutate(verbatimCoordinates = Lat_Lon,
    
    decimalLatitude = as.numeric(format(round(as.numeric(str_extract(Lat_Lon, "^[0-9.]+")), 4), nsmall = 4)),
    
    decimalLongitude = as.numeric(format(round(as.numeric(str_extract(Lat_Lon, "[0-9.]+(?=\\s*[EW])")), 4), nsmall = 4)),
    decimalLongitude = if_else(str_detect(Lat_Lon, "W"), decimalLongitude * -1, decimalLongitude),
  
    geodeticDatum = "WGS84"
  )  %>%
  # rename remaining columns in DwC
  rename(
    locality = Site_Name,
    eventDate = Date
  ) %>%
  # keep only the standardized DwC columns (drop Lat_Lon)
  select(BioSample, locality, eventDate, decimalLatitude, decimalLongitude, geodeticDatum, verbatimCoordinates)

# preview DwC compliant table
print(dwc_df)
```
```{r}
#| label: clean and standardize localities for plotting
# apply locality cleaning pipeline
clean_dwc_df <- dwc_df %>%
  mutate(
    # retain original locality string
    verbatimLocality = locality,
    
    # Fix shorthand 'R' or 'R.' to 'River' using word boundaries
    clean_locality = str_replace_all(locality, "\\bR\\b\\.?", "River"),
    
    # Split on common connectors (@, near, off, at)
    river_part    = str_split_i(clean_locality, "\\s+(?i)(@|near|off|at)\\s+", 1),
    landmark_part = str_split_i(clean_locality, "\\s+(?i)(@|near|off|at)\\s+", 2),
    
    # Build standardized locality
    standardized_locality = if_else(
      !is.na(landmark_part) & landmark_part != "",
      paste0(river_part, ", ", landmark_part),
      river_part
    )
  ) %>%
  select(-locality, -clean_locality, -river_part, -landmark_part) %>%
  rename(locality = standardized_locality) %>%
  relocate(locality, .after = eventDate)
  ```
